caption: A woman with dark hair tied back and wearing glasses, a white long-sleeved shirt, and a dark vest stands behind a podium in a room with wood-paneled walls. She is speaking into a microphone and holding a small object to her mouth. In front of her, several people are seated with their backs to the camera; some have blonde or brown hair and wear dark clothing. A white logo with the text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the woman shifts her gaze from the audience down toward the podium. The seated audience members remain still, and the overall setting remains constant throughout the clip.
